tools.name: create_survey
tools.description: Create a new survey. Returns the survey details including share_url. Supported question types: short_text, long_text, multiple_choice, checkbox, checkbox_list, numeric, star_rating, picture_choice, opinion_scale, date, email, contact_info, poll_question, statement.

tools.name: list_surveys
tools.description: List all surveys in your PollBolt account with pagination.

tools.name: get_survey
tools.description: Get full details of a specific survey including all questions.

tools.name: update_survey
tools.description: Update a survey's title, questions, settings, styles, screens, or logic. Providing questions replaces all existing questions.

tools.name: delete_survey
tools.description: Permanently delete a survey and all its responses.

tools.name: list_responses
tools.description: List responses for a survey with pagination and filters. Returns response metadata and answers.

tools.name: get_response
tools.description: Get a single response by ID.

tools.name: submit_response
tools.description: Submit a response to a survey programmatically. Answers is a map of question_id to answer value.

tools.name: get_analytics
tools.description: Get analytics summary for a survey (views, responses, completion rate).

tools.name: list_media_library_images
tools.description: List images from the account's media library, including brandkits, uploaded media, logos, and theme backgrounds.

tools.name: duplicate_survey
tools.description: Create a copy of an existing survey with all its questions, styles, logic, and screens. Returns the new survey details including share_url.

tools.name: create_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook to receive notifications when survey events occur.

tools.name: list_webhooks
tools.description: List all registered webhooks for your account.

tools.name: update_webhook
tools.description: Update a webhook's URL, events, active status, or secret.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "update_webhook" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Update a webhook's URL, events, active status, or secret.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: create_webhook · Private data: update_webhook · Public sink: create_survey, submit_response, create_webhook, update_webhook, delete_webhook · Destructive: delete_survey, delete_webhook.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: create_webhook · Private data: update_webhook · Public sink: create_survey, submit_response, create_webhook, update_webhook, delete_webhook · Destructive: delete_survey, delete_webhook

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
